notableEvents.label: Jake McCarthy GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jake McCarthy grounds into a double play, first baseman Jake Bauers to shortstop David Hamilton to pitcher Brandon Sproat. Sterlin Thompson out at 2nd. Jake McCarthy out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: William Contreras reaches on a fielder's choice. Brice Turang to 3rd. Brice Turang advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by pitcher Antonio Senzatela.

notableEvents.label: Brett Sullivan GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brett Sullivan grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop Joey Ortiz to first baseman Jake Bauers. Ezequiel Tovar to 3rd. Sterlin Thompson out at 2nd. Brett Sullivan out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brett Sullivan rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brett Sullivan grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop Joey Ortiz to first baseman Jake Bauers. Ezequiel Tovar to 3rd. Sterlin Thompson out at 2nd. Brett Sullivan out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Vaughn pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Vaughn singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jake McCarthy. Jake Bauers scores. Sal Frelick scores.
